raw_source.title: 🌟 Join the Roosh Tech Team as a Crypto Researcher! 🌟
raw_source.body:
Are you passionate about Web3 and Crypto? Roosh Tech is seeking part-time Crypto Researchers to join our dynamic team and explore the most exciting opportunities in the blockchain space.

💻 About Us:
At Roosh Tech, we focus on identifying and supporting early-stage Web3 projects. With a collaborative team of founders, engineers, and investors, we analyze market trends, share insights, and contribute to the future of blockchain innovation. Visit our website to learn more: [roosh.tech/en](https://roosh.tech/en).

💰 Salary and Benefits:
Earn $900 - $1500 per week (flexible, part-time role).

📍 Location:
Remote work available.

🌵 Job Requirements:
1️⃣ A strong curiosity about the crypto and Web3 ecosystem, with a passion for exploring and learning.
2️⃣ Understanding of blockchain trends, DAOs, and industry hot spots; ability to source first-hand information from diverse communities.
3️⃣ Excellent analytical and writing skills, with the ability to craft detailed reports and summaries.
4️⃣ Experience in crypto research, data analysis, or market tracking is a plus.
5️⃣ Proficiency in English for reviewing and translating materials from English resources.

🌟 Why Join Us?

Be part of a forward-thinking team exploring groundbreaking Web3 projects.
Flexible work hours, allowing you to contribute while balancing other commitments.
Opportunities to collaborate with top-tier investors and developers.
📩 How to Apply:
Contact us via Telegram: https://t.me/Roosh_Dmitrenko

Take the next step in your crypto journey and make an impact in the future of Web3 with Roosh Tech! 🚀

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
